# use-chrome-ai

> Headless, framework-agnostic primitives + React hooks + Vue composables for Chrome's built-in AI (Gemini Nano, and Edge's Phi-4-mini). Runs on-device — no API keys, no server, nothing leaves the browser. Covers all seven APIs: Prompt/LanguageModel, Summarizer, Writer, Rewriter, Proofreader, Translator, Language Detector. Streaming, model-download progress, user-activation gating, and mid-session eviction recovery are handled for you. The library ships logic only — you build the UI.

Install: `npm i @use-chrome-ai/react` (React) · `npm i use-chrome-ai` (vanilla JS) · `npm i @use-chrome-ai/vue` (Vue). Each adapter depends on and re-exports the core, so you can import the hooks and the `create*`/`isSupported` helpers from one place.

Things an assistant should know before writing code with this library:

- **Progressive enhancement, never throws on unsupported browsers.** Built-in AI is desktop Chrome/Edge only, partly behind flags/origin trials, with real disk/VRAM requirements. Every hook exposes `isUnavailable` / `availability`; gate your UI on it and render a fallback.
- **First use downloads a multi-GB model and Chrome requires a user gesture to start it.** When `availability === 'downloadable'`, render a button and call `download()` from its click handler, or call the action directly from a click. Calling an action with no gesture while downloadable throws `ActivationRequiredError`.
- **Streaming** resolves into `result` (task hooks: `useSummarizer`/`useWriter`/`useRewriter`/`useTranslator`/`usePrompt`) or `messages` (`useChat`). Abort with `stop()`. Hooks never reject — read `error`. Core functions (`create*`) DO reject, for imperative control.
- **`availability`** is `'unavailable' | 'downloadable' | 'downloading' | 'available'`. **`phase`** (`'idle' | 'creating' | 'running' | 'streaming' | 'error'`) is what the controller is doing right now.

## Docs

- [README](./README.md): overview, the one-hook chatbot, the seven APIs, the demos.
- [Core quick start](./docs/core.md): vanilla JS — `createChat` + the `create*` factories, plus the full type/factory reference.
- [React quick start](./docs/react.md): the hooks + their signatures.
- [Vue quick start](./docs/vue.md): the composables + their signatures.
- [Enabling built-in AI](./docs/enabling-built-in-ai.md): links to Google's setup docs, the iframe permission tokens, and a verify checklist.

## Packages

- `use-chrome-ai`: zero-dependency, framework-agnostic core — `createChat` + seven `create*` factories + `isSupported`/`isApiSupported` + streaming/error utilities.
- `@use-chrome-ai/react`: React hooks — `useChat`, `usePrompt`, `useSummarizer`, `useWriter`, `useRewriter`, `useTranslator`, `useProofreader`, `useLanguageDetector`, `useModelStatus`, `useAiController`.
- `@use-chrome-ai/vue`: Vue composables — `useChat`, `useModelStatus`.
